# VeriMarka

VeriMarka is a web service for image copyright registration, watermark insertion, blockchain proof issuance, and authenticity verification.

## Core pages
- Home: https://verimarka.com/
- Register content: https://verimarka.com/register
- Verify content: https://verimarka.com/verify
- Support and FAQ: https://verimarka.com/support
- Terms: https://verimarka.com/terms
- Privacy: https://verimarka.com/privacy

## What the service does
- Upload image-based content for similarity analysis
- Insert a watermark into approved content
- Record issuance data on blockchain
- Verify whether an image contains watermark evidence and registration history

## Audience
- Creators
- Copyright owners
- Review and trust teams

## Contact
- Support email: emfpdlzj@gmail.com
